meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. An Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your career.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth solved by shipping a production-ready SaaS starter kit. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for iterative development, you can build a scalable, multi-tenant application in hours, proving your engineering maturity to recruiters and clients with a live, functional product.
content.intro:
You stare at the blank terminal, the weight of a hundred 'to-do list' tutorials pressing down on you. You have the skills, but your GitHub profile is a graveyard of abandoned exercises. The industry doesn't care about your coursework; it cares about the architecture of your ambition. It is time to stop building toys and start shipping infrastructure.

Today, we bridge the gap between student and senior developer. We are going to architect a robust SaaS starter kit—not just a landing page, but an authenticated, database-driven engine. We will harness the raw velocity of Antigravity and the precision of Claude Code to transform your portfolio from a list of promises into a testament of engineering excellence.

steps.title: Architecting the SaaS Skeleton
steps.description: Define the core foundation of your SaaS, including multi-tenancy support and secure authentication flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a foundational SaaS architecture using Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind. Include multi-tenant organization logic, user roles, and Stripe subscription webhook placeholders.

steps.title: Implementing Secure Auth Flows
steps.description: Establish industrial-grade authentication so your users can sign up and secure their workspaces immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an auth-middleware implementation for Next.js that handles private routes, redirects for unauthenticated users, and session persistence.

steps.title: Configuring the Billing Engine
steps.description: Integrate Stripe to demonstrate that you understand how to monetize software, a key skill for any SaaS engineer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a Stripe integration module that handles checkout sessions, subscription status webhooks, and billing portal access.

steps.title: Database Schema Optimization
steps.description: Normalize your data structure to ensure high performance as your user base scales from zero to one million.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a SaaS platform including tables for profiles, organizations, and subscription_tiers with proper foreign key constraints.

steps.title: Deploying the Production Pipeline
steps.description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline to ensure that every push to main results in a live, tested production build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel, including linting and type-checking steps.

pro_tips: Always build for multi-tenancy from day one; it forces you to write cleaner, more decoupled code that scales effortlessly.
Use feature flags to separate your experimental code from your production-ready features, showing employers you understand production stability.
Document your architectural decisions in a 'Design Docs' folder; recruiters love seeing how you think through trade-offs.
Implement automated end-to-end tests for the 'happy path' of user registration; it proves you prioritize user experience and reliability.
Keep your commit history clean by using atomic commits that map to specific features, demonstrating professional collaborative workflows.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, customize the UI to match a specific niche market, add a unique utility feature, and publish it on Product Hunt to get your first real users.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. You have the tools, the architecture, and the strategy to build a product that commands respect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
